Container.Name: featherdrop
Container.Overview: featherdrop is a sleek, feather-light, self-hosted file sharer. Open the page, drop a file, set an expiry (plus an optional password or download limit), and share a short link or QR code. Files are encrypted at rest with age; set a MASTER_KEY to get short share links. Resumable uploads (tus), files on a local volume, metadata in a single SQLite file — no separate database, no accounts, no tracking. 26 languages, light/dark, and custom branding (APP_NAME/APP_LOGO/ACCENT_COLOR). Put it behind a reverse proxy and set BASE_URL so share links use your public domain.
Container.DonateText: If this template helps you, consider buying me a coffee.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port the featherdrop web interface listens on.

Config.Name: Data Directory (uploads)
Config.Description: Bulk storage for the uploaded files. Can live on slower array storage. Kept separate from the small metadata database (see Config Directory).

Config.Name: Config Directory (database)
Config.Description: Stores the small SQLite metadata database (db.sqlite). Best kept on fast storage (e.g. the SSD cache/appdata). Separate from the bulk uploads (see Data Directory).

Config.Name: Config Dir (container path)
Config.Description: Container path the SQLite database is written to. Must match the Config Directory mount above (/config). Advanced — leave as /config.

Config.Name: Public Base URL
Config.Description: Public URL featherdrop is reached at — replace this placeholder with your own domain (e.g. https://featherdrop.yourdomain.tld). Used so generated share links point at your domain behind a reverse proxy. Leave empty to use the address the browser is on.

Config.Name: Default Expiry
Config.Description: Expiry pre-selected in the UI when an uploader does not choose one. Pick from the dropdown: 1h, 6h, 1d, 7d, 30d, or never.

Config.Name: Max File Size (bytes)
Config.Description: Maximum upload size in bytes. 0 = unlimited (only limited by disk space). Example: 5368709120 = 5 GB.

Config.Name: Encrypt Uploads
Config.Description: Encrypt new uploads at rest with age. true (recommended) = files are encrypted on disk and the filename is hidden too. false = store plaintext. Existing files keep their stored mode.

Config.Name: Master Key (short links)
Config.Description: Optional. Set a secret here to get SHORT links for password-less shares (e.g. /d/aB3xK instead of a long #key in the URL). The per-file key is then wrapped with this master key and stored, instead of riding in the link. Keep it secret and back it up: it lives only here, not in the data volume, so a stolen backup stays unreadable — but if you lose it, password-less files become unrecoverable. Generate one with: openssl rand -base64 32. Leave empty to keep the long #key links.

Config.Name: Custom App Name
Config.Description: Optional. Rename the app — replaces the 'featherdrop' wordmark in the header and the browser tab title with your own name. Leave empty to keep 'featherdrop'.

Config.Name: Custom Logo URL
Config.Description: Optional. Your own logo (SVG/PNG) to replace the feather: either a public image URL, or a data: URI so you need no hosting and no file on disk. To make a data URI, run 'base64 -w0 logo.svg' and prefix the output with data:image/svg+xml;base64, (use image/png for a PNG). Leave empty to keep the feather.

Config.Name: Accent Color
Config.Description: Optional. A 6-digit hex colour (e.g. #3daee9) for buttons, the upload ring and other accents. Leave empty to keep the gold (#d4af37).
